# Coroplast A Frames

### Custom Full-Color Coroplast A Frames 

![3 coroplast a frame signs of different heights next to each other.](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/21-11-30-coroplast a-frames copy.jpg)

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#05bde7ca-5144-45b4-8a64-701c72834a25)

#### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse)

#### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse)

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse)

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse)

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

#### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

## **1 Business Day Priority:**

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

![1 Business Day Priority Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-1 Business Day Priority.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### [Payment](#paymentCollapse)

All Coroplast A Frames must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check).

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse)

#### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse)

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13209659300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

#### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse)

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Days )

Overnight ( 1 Business Day )

UPS Overnight AM

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

#### [Material](#materialCollapse)

## 4 mm Corrugated Plastic Material

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4’ x 8’ sheet (the 96 in direction.)

The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

### Corrugated Sign Features:

Standard 4 mm thickness  
Digitally printed in full color  
Add unlimited text, colors, logos and graphics  
Slightly ribbed surface  
Waterproof  
Can withstand extreme hot and cold temperatures  
Lasts up to 2 years outdoors  
Printed with a full bleed.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13209659300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Due to the lightweight nature of this product, when used as an outdoor sign we recommend using a sandbag or some form of weight to hold the sign down so that it does not blow away.

## More About Corrugated A Frame Signs [Return to Top](#top)

Coroplast A frames are a great, inexpensive way for your customers to advertise their restaurant, storefront, special event, and so much more! These double sided, plastic a-frame signs give you the opportunity to have a customizable sign, printed in full color, that is easy to move and use. This is due to how lightweight and durable the 4mm coroplast plastic sign material is. These high quality 4mm coroplast a frame signs are a great weatherproof sign option that can be used either indoors and outdoors.

Due to the lightweight nature of this product, when used as an outdoor sign we recommend using a sandbag or some form of weight to hold the sign down so that it does not blow away.

### Common Uses for Coroplast A Frame Signs

Coroplast a frame signs are versatile and cost effective making them perfect for businesses and organizations wanting to draw attention in high foot traffic areas. Some common uses for these signs includes:

*   **A Frame Advertising Boards** - Businesses can use these custom signs for sales and promotions, special or limited time offers, and events. They are commonly used in front of restaurants, stores, and event centers.
*   **A Frame Business Signs** - Direct potential customers or bring attention to new products or special offers. These signs can be customized to your branding needs and guidelines ensuring cohesive advertising.
*   **A Frame Real Estate Signs** - Commonly used by real estate agents or real estate agencies to create a branded open house experience and direct potential buyers to open houses or draw attention to homes listed for sale.
*   **Outdoor A Frame Signs** - This material is weather resistant and durable making it great for outdoor use. Commonly used near parking lots and event entrances.
*   **A Frame Store Signs** - Sidewalk signs are frequently used by retail businesses to direct potential customers to store promotions, specials, sales or events.
*   **A Frame Parking Signs** - Place in or near parking lots. Great for reserved parking, directional signage, or no parking zones.

### More Uses

*   **Event Signage** - Festivals, outdoor markets, trade shows and more! Provide attendees with directions or event schedules and details.
*   **School & Community Notices** - Registrations and enrollments, fundraisers, PTA meetings. Make sure parents and students don’t miss any important updates.
*   **Political Campaigns** - Great for polling places and campaign events. Place on sidewalks to easily reach voters with your message.
*   **Construction & Safety Signs** - Job hazards and safety concerns. Make sure foot traffic near job sites are aware of what to expect and take precautions.

## **Coroplast A-Frame Sign FAQs**

### What are Coroplast A-frame signs?

Coroplast A-frame signs are **foldable corrugated plastic (coroplast) sidewalk signs** that are **lightweight, durable, and budget-friendly** for high-visibility indoor or outdoor promotions.

### What are coroplast sidewalk A-frame signs used for?

They’re commonly used as **restaurant sidewalk signs, storefront promotion signs, event signage, open house or real estate A-frames, parking or directional signs,** and **community notices** in high foot-traffic areas.

### What material are your coroplast A-frame signs made from?

They’re made from **4 mm corrugated plastic (coroplast)** with internal flutes, which adds strength while keeping the sign lightweight and easy to move.

### Are Coroplast A-frame signs printed in full color?

Yes—these plastic A-frame signs are **digitally printed in full color (CMYK)** for vibrant graphics.

### Are your coroplast A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes—Coroplast A-frame signs are **double-sided** (two visible sides) for maximum sidewalk visibility.

### Are coroplast A-frame signs weatherproof for outdoor use?

Yes—4 mm coroplast is **weather-resistant and waterproof**, making it a strong option for an outdoor A-frame sign.

### Will wind knock over a coroplast outdoor A-frame sign?

Because coroplast A-frames are lightweight, **wind is the main risk outdoors**. For outdoor placement, add a sandbag or weight to help prevent tipping or blowaways.

### What sizes do your coroplast A-frame signs come in?

We offer four sizes: **12" × 18", 18" × 24", 22" × 28", and 24" × 36"**.

### Do you provide coroplast A-frame templates?

Yes—templates are available in **PDF and EPS** for **12×18, 18×24, 22×28, and 24×36** to help set up artwork correctly.

### How do I set up and store a coroplast A-frame sign?

Setup is quick—**fold along the scores** and place the sign. For storage, **fold it flat** and keep it in a **dry, temperature-controlled** area to reduce scuffs and scratches.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
